meta.title: Solvefy Agents — AI Copilot for B2B Sales and Marketing
meta.description: 15+ AI agents ready to operate 24/7 in your sales team. SDR, strategic deal, content and meeting analysis. Start with 50% OFF.

hero.title: AI agents for <accent>sales and marketing teams</accent>
hero.subtitle: Put multiple specialists working 24/7 in your operation. From SDRs running market-tailored methodologies to squads creating social media content, Agents handles the operational work so your team can focus on closing deals. All in your language and within a single platform.

pain.title: Your team is the front line. <accent>Solvefy/Agents is the operational engine.</accent>
pain.subtitle: Prospecting, qualifying, writing proposals and creating content eats up precious hours that should be spent building customer relationships. Solvefy/Agents acts as a copilot alongside your team. It takes on the manual, repetitive work so your people can produce more, focus on strategy and multiply results.

inefficiency.title: Operational Inefficiency
inefficiency.desc: High-cost professionals allocated to data mining and repetitive routines, wasting analytical capacity and reducing team ROI.

latency.title: Sales Cycle Latency
latency.desc: Manual proposal building creates pipeline friction, cooling high-intent leads and dragging down conversion rates.

fragmented.title: Fragmented Efforts
fragmented.desc: The absence of AI-orchestrated processes forces the operation to split focus between demand gen and closing, throttling scalability.

pillars.title: Why is <accent>Solvefy Agents</accent> different?
pillars.subtitle: We're not yet another generic AI tool. We're B2B sales specialists.

ready.title: Ready agents, not templates
ready.desc: Don't waste time building. We deliver 15+ configured agents up and running today.

squads.title: Visual squads
squads.desc: Orchestrate agents in transparent work pipelines with named personas.

vendasMkt.title: Sales + Marketing
vendasMkt.desc: SDR, Discovery and Proposal, working side by side with social content creation.

dna.title: Local DNA
dna.desc: Forget robotic translations. Prompts trained for your market, using SPIN and MEDDPICC.

agentsFlow.title: Meet your new <accent>team operating 24/7</accent>
agentsFlow.subtitle: Four agents ready to run today, covering the entire B2B sales and marketing cycle — no hiring, no onboarding.

sdr.label: General SDR
sdr.description: Runs research, outreach and qualification based on the best B2B sales playbooks in the market.

deal.label: Strategic Deal
deal.description: Deep competitive analysis and objection handling to accelerate deal closing.

social.label: Social Squad
social.description: Research, fact-check and post creation for Instagram and LinkedIn in minutes, no agency.

reuniao.label: Meeting Analysis
reuniao.description: Evaluates transcripts and generates actionable sales insights to prep your team to close.

personas.title: Built for <accent>those who need results</accent>
personas.subtitle: Different profiles, the same impact: more output with less effort.

founders.label: Founders / SMBs
founders.headline: Your virtual team to scale without growing the payroll.
founders.desc: Hire 15 specialists today for less than a $500 salary. Agents handles prospecting, creates content and follows up with leads while your team focuses on closing.
founders.b3: Social media content without depending on an agency

comercial.label: Head of Sales
comercial.headline: Double your SDRs' output and ensure 100% prepared sellers.
comercial.desc: Meeting analysis, automatic seller prep and orchestrated follow-up. Your team focuses on closing — Agents handles the rest.
comercial.b3: Follow-up with no silence and no lost leads

marketing.label: Marketing / Agencies
marketing.headline: Replace expensive freelancers and deliver entire campaigns in minutes.
marketing.desc: 10 specialized content agents working in parallel: research, fact-check, copy, carousel and scheduling — with your brand's tone and voice.
marketing.b2: Posts, carousels and articles in hours, not days
marketing.b3: Consistent tone and voice across every piece

pricing.title: Choose the <accent>right</accent> plan to grow.
pricing.subtitle: Billed in BRL, no FX swings and no fine print.
pricing.footnote: All plans include Portuguese support and workspace with unlimited users.

best.name: Pro
best.f6: Multi-model: Full access (Gemini, Claude and GPT)

squadLive.title: Watch the squad working in real time
squadLive.subtitle: One trigger comes in, four specialists act in sequence, and the finished message appears in seconds.

orchestrator.label: Orchestrator Agent
orchestrator.detail: Segment identified: Industry / Manufacturing B2B. Delegating missions to the specialist squad.

nadia.label: Nadia News
nadia.detail: Mapping digital presence, role and intent signals of the lead.
nadia.directive: Map inbound bottlenecks: identify if the company struggles with low qualified lead volume or long conversion cycles in the manufacturing segment.

felipe.label: Felipe Facts
felipe.detail: Building an ABM message with sector hook, mapped pain and social proof.
felipe.directive: ABM focus: write a personalized message for B2B manufacturing, using outcome language (shorter sales cycle, larger qualified pipeline).

linkedin.label: LinkedIn Agent
linkedin.detail: Preparing LinkedIn send with optimized timing and format.
linkedin.directive: Prepare case study send: attach a similar industry case with measurable results and suggest a connection for a 20-minute call.

output.label: Generated message
output.hook: Carlos, I saw you're interested in structured B2B prospecting — exactly what we solve for teams like yours.
output.pain: Many directors waste hours qualifying leads manually. Solvefy Agents does it in seconds, 24/7.
output.cta: Can I show you how it works in 15 minutes this week?

mockup.userMessage: Lucas, generate an authority post about B2B prospecting.
mockup.aiMessage: Analyzing market pains... Generating the ideal hook for sales directors.
